---
title: "Publications"
toc: false
listing:
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: table
  fields: [title, author, publication, date, categories]
  field-display-names:
    publication: "Journal"
    date: "Year"
    author: "Authors"
    categories: "Type"
  date-format: "YYYY"
  filter-ui: [title, author, publication, categories]
  sort-ui: [date, title, publication]
  categories: true
  page-size: 30
---
